title: glicophyllum pusillum
intro: Glicophyllum pusillum, also known as small-flowered gilia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glicophyllum pusillum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Glicophyllum pusillum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
